action.reasoning: Observation: ESM2-150M with window [530:620], 5 epochs gave val_spearman=0.8922, test=0.8524 (new best). Iter 8 took ~408s (7min). I have 4.83h left, 20 iters. Analysis: Val was still improving at epoch 4 (0.8922). More epochs might help. Also could try wider window or full sequence. Let me train longer (8 epochs) with same setup. 8 epochs ~= 11min. Decision: train ESM2-150M for 8 epochs with same window.
action.command: WIN_START=530 WIN_END=620 MODEL=150M EPOCHS=8 BS=32 LR=1e-4 python train.py
